title: Echani shield suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Bonadan_Alloy_Heavy_Suit.jpg|thumb|150px|The armor.]]

The '''Echani shield suit''' was a form of light [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that was developed by the [[Echani/Legends|Echani]]. Using their talent for creating energy [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]], the armorsmiths of the Echani integrated miniaturized projectors into this suit, further improving its effectiveness against energy-based attacks.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
